test-case.description: returns the loaded module version from Get-SandboxVersion
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox module.returns the loaded module version from Get-SandboxVersion

test-case.description: keeps the runtime registry aligned with the supported runtime set
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps the runtime registry aligned with the supported runtime set

test-case.description: assembles hotspot runtime descriptors through dedicated registry providers
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.assembles hotspot runtime descriptors through dedicated registry providers

test-case.description: derives runtime snapshot metadata directly from registry descriptors
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.derives runtime snapshot metadata directly from registry descriptors

test-case.description: exposes descriptor-driven family metadata for Node, Python, and VC runtime orchestration
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.exposes descriptor-driven family metadata for Node, Python, and VC runtime orchestration

test-case.description: delegates the Node, Python, and VC runtime facades through private family helpers
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.delegates the Node, Python, and VC runtime facades through private family helpers

test-case.description: keeps every exported runtime initializer as a thin facade over the correct family helper
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps every exported runtime initializer as a thin facade over the correct family helper

test-case.description: routes VS Code command-environment expectations through descriptor metadata
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.routes VS Code command-environment expectations through descriptor metadata

test-case.description: plans Codex dependencies through registry metadata instead of hard-coded orchestration
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.plans Codex dependencies through registry metadata instead of hard-coded orchestration

test-case.description: keeps GitHub-portable runtime facades free of unreachable legacy bodies
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps GitHub-portable runtime facades free of unreachable legacy bodies

test-case.description: loads private implementation files before public facades in every runtime pack loader
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.loads private implementation files before public facades in every runtime pack loader

test-case.description: keeps hotspot runtime root files as capability shims
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps hotspot runtime root files as capability shims

test-case.description: plans Node runtime follow-up actions through family metadata
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.plans Node runtime follow-up actions through family metadata

test-case.description: plans Python managed follow-up actions through family metadata
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.plans Python managed follow-up actions through family metadata

test-case.description: keeps machine prerequisite planning free of command-environment synchronization
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps machine prerequisite planning free of command-environment synchronization

test-case.description: preserves VS Code persisted detail extras in the shared GitHub-portable helper
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.preserves VS Code persisted detail extras in the shared GitHub-portable helper

test-case.description: preserves Node persisted details in the family helper
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.preserves Node persisted details in the family helper

test-case.description: preserves Python persisted details in the family helper
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.preserves Python persisted details in the family helper

test-case.description: preserves machine prerequisite persisted details in the family helper
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.preserves machine prerequisite persisted details in the family helper

test-case.description: constructs lifecycle results with shared and family-specific properties intact
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.constructs lifecycle results with shared and family-specific properties intact

test-case.description: completes WhatIf lifecycle results without persisting state
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.completes WhatIf lifecycle results without persisting state

test-case.description: skips runtime command-environment synchronization cleanly when not applicable
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.skips runtime command-environment synchronization cleanly when not applicable

test-case.description: tracks command-environment sync updates through the lifecycle helper
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.tracks command-environment sync updates through the lifecycle helper

test-case.description: returns a WhatIf result shape for the Node facade without persisting state
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.returns a WhatIf result shape for the Node facade without persisting state

test-case.description: returns a WhatIf result shape for the Python facade without persisting state
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.returns a WhatIf result shape for the Python facade without persisting state

test-case.description: returns a WhatIf result shape for the VC runtime facade without persisting state
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.returns a WhatIf result shape for the VC runtime facade without persisting state

test-case.description: returns a non-WhatIf result shape for the VC runtime facade success path
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.returns a non-WhatIf result shape for the VC runtime facade success path

test-case.description: keeps shared runtime family helpers free of inline if argument expressions
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps shared runtime family helpers free of inline if argument expressions

test-case.description: keeps exported commands aligned with the manifest contract
test-case.name: Eigenverft.Manifested.Sandbox runtime contracts.keeps exported commands aligned with the manifest contract
